text:
Discharge Goal Chair/Bed Transfer Code - The data in this column indicates the patient's discharge goal to safely transfer to and from a bed to a chair (or wheelchair) at the time of admission. CHAR 2 The data in this column indicates the patient's discharge goal to safely transfer to and from a bed to a chair (or wheelchair) at the time of admission. 01 = Dependent
02 = Substantial/maximal assistance
03 = Partial/moderate assistance
04 = Supervision or touching assistance
05 = Setup or
